Thursday, 5th March 2026 | Environment Committee

Planning Bill; Natural Environment Bill

Hearing of evidence: 

Engineering New Zealand
Dr Richard Templer, Chief Executive
Annette Sweeney, Managing Director & Principal Environmental Engineer of Good Earth Matters

New Zealand Initiative
Nick Clark, Senior Fellow, Economics and Advocacy
Dr Eric Crampton, Chief Economist
Dr Bryce Wilkinson, Senior Fellow
Dr Benno Blaschke, Research Fellow
